name: hcltech-ai-lab-skills
description: HCLTech AI Lab skills for agentic solution architecture, ROM estimation, diagram design, and branded slide generation.
author: HCLTech AI Lab

skills.name: agentic-arch-documenter
skills.description: Produces L1/L2/L3 architecture documents from any customer input — briefs, RFPs, PPTs, PDFs, or plain text. Orchestrates docx and pptx skills for branded HCLTech output.

skills.name: architecture-diagram-designer
skills.description: Creates and improves architecture diagrams in Mermaid across L1, L2, and L3 views. Platform-neutral by default; adapts to AWS, Azure, GCP, or on-prem.

skills.name: hcltech-rom-package-builder
skills.description: Builds complete HCLTech ROM packages from messy client inputs. Orchestrates agentic-arch-documenter, architecture-diagram-designer, pptx, and hcltech-slide-artist-openai.

skills.name: hcltech-slide-artist-openai
skills.description: Generates HCLTech-branded 16:9 slide images using the OpenAI Images API. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY and Node.js 18+.
